title: PR: incorrect query result with MV and JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE n4 (key BIGINT, value DOUBLE) ENGINE=InnoDB;

INSERT INTO n4 (key, value) SELECT number, number / 2.0 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS numbers;
CREATE VIEW mv2 AS SELECT n1.key AS k, n1.value AS v1, n4.value AS v2 FROM n1 JOIN n4 ON n1.key = n4.key;

INSERT INTO n1 (key, value) SELECT number, CAST(number + 50 AS CHAR) FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS numbers;
SELECT * FROM mv2 JOIN n3 ON mv2.k = n3.key WHERE mv2.v2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mv2.k, n3.key;
key_bug_features: Query with JOIN and MV on left side
